title: Update storage manpage from c/storage
body:
This manpage has had a few updates from containers/storage. Is that project integrated into skopeo in some way that possibly misses this file? If so please let me know and I will make the appropriate change.

Signed-off-by: Ryan Whalen <rj.whalen@gmail.com>

comments.body:
Not sure why this file is here, since it is also stored in
https://github.com/containers/storage/blob/master/docs/containers-storage.conf.5.md

I know in Fedora we assemble the content from each different containers repo and ship the man pages together in containers-common.

Anyways LGTM
Ditto @rhatdan.  The changes look good, but if all possible I'd like to remove this file from skopeo and just use the one in containers/storage.  @lsm5 @mtrmac @vrothberg is this possible?
The file was added for @lsm5 , let’s wait for him.
Lets remove the file and rely on containers/storage.  Eventually we should just move it to containers/common.

I am just going to remove these files.
Thanks @rwha
